services.name: Microsoft Entra ID
services.description: Authenticates enterprise users and issues access tokens

services.name: App Service
services.description: Hosts the RAG web application and handles the user experience

services.name: Azure AI Foundry
services.description: Orchestrates prompt flow, retrieval, and generation for the RAG pipeline

services.name: Azure Cognitive Search
services.description: Provides hybrid keyword and vector retrieval over indexed enterprise content

services.name: Azure OpenAI
services.description: Generates grounded responses using retrieved context

services.name: Azure Cache for Redis
services.description: Stores semantic cache entries for repeated questions and responses

services.name: Storage Account
services.description: Stores source documents and indexed content for the knowledge base

services.name: Log Analytics
services.description: Collects application and orchestration logs for analysis

connections.label: Authenticate enterprise users and issue sign-in tokens
Submit authenticated user prompts to the orchestration layer
Check semantic cache for an existing answer before retrieval
Run hybrid vector and keyword retrieval for grounded context
Resolve indexed document chunks from the source content repository
Send grounded prompt and retrieved context for GPT-5 generation
Store completed answer for future semantic cache hits
Emit orchestration and retrieval telemetry for centralized analysis

workflow.description: A user signs in through Microsoft Entra ID and reaches the App Service hosted RAG experience.
The authenticated user submits a question from App Service to Azure AI Foundry for orchestration.
Azure AI Foundry checks Azure Cache for Redis to reuse a semantically similar prior answer when available.
On a cache miss, Azure AI Foundry queries Azure Cognitive Search using both vector similarity and keyword filters.
Azure Cognitive Search serves the most relevant chunks from the indexed document corpus in Storage Account.
Azure AI Foundry composes a grounded prompt from the retrieved context and sends it to Azure OpenAI.
Azure OpenAI generates the final GPT-5 response and returns it to Azure AI Foundry.
Azure AI Foundry writes the completed response to Azure Cache for Redis and returns the answer to App Service.

metadata.prompt: An enterprise RAG application with Azure AI Foundry for orchestration, Azure AI Search with hybrid vector and keyword retrieval, Azure OpenAI GPT-5 for generation, Azure Cache for Redis for semantic caching, and App Service with Entra ID authentication
